description: Next.js /_next/data/<buildId>/*.json routes embed the deployment's build id in the URL — they 404 the moment the app is redeployed and carry no business state.
llmFlowNotes: Next.js /_next/data/<buildId>/*.json requests are build-artifact fetches: a 404 there means the build id changed, not that the flow is broken. They are safe to disable.
